title: Decision record: inventory-based dispatch avoids match-arm rot
description:
## Decision
The umbrella crate (secretx/src/lib.rs) dispatches backend construction via inventory::iter over BackendRegistration/WritableBackendRegistration/SigningBackendRegistration singletons, rather than a match arm per backend.

## Rationale
Each backend crate self-registers via inventory::submit!() in its own lib.rs. Adding a new backend only requires adding a new crate and dependency — no centralized dispatch table to update. Eliminates the classic 'forgot to add the match arm' bug.

## Trade-off accepted
inventory relies on linker-section magic (.ctors/.init_array) which requires the backend crate to be linked. The umbrella crate uses use secretx_xxx as _ to force rlib inclusion when the feature is enabled. This is noted in comments.

## Record this as a confirmed good decision.
